results.content:
Zephyra Outfitters FAQ.
We ship to five regions: Ontario, Quebec, Prairie, Atlantic, Pacific. Delivery timelines and fees vary by region; see the regional shipping documents. Return windows vary by product category; see the category return policies. Current prices and stock are available only in the product catalog.

Zephyra Outfitters Warranty — sleeping bags.
All sleeping bags sold by Zephyra Outfitters carry a 5-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. The warranty excludes normal wear, misuse, and unauthorized repairs. Warranty claims require the original order number.

Care Guide — sleeping bags.
To extend the life of your sleeping bags: clean after each trip with mild soap, dry fully before storage, and store loosely in a cool dry place. Do not machine-wash unless the product label explicitly allows it. For pricing and stock levels, consult the product catalog.
